/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/backend_quant_terminal.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend_quant_terminal.dir/src/market_data/BinanceMarketData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend_quant_terminal.dir/src/OrderGateway.cpp.o -o backend_quant_terminal  /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib
